case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. BIR BAHADUR DANGI

REMARK:RECEIVED RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE ON 10/3/2025. SMALL CLAIMS-CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO BIR BAHADUR DANGI. RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD, RETURN TO SENDER.
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO OCT-20-2025 AT 1:30PM
